no_policy_groups_desc: Policy groups let you route uploads across one or more storage policies.
policy_group_invalid_assignment: The current policy group assignment is unavailable. Choose another active group or this user's uploads will fail.
policy_group_no_assignable_groups: No assignable policy groups are available yet. Create an enabled group with at least one rule first.
policy_group_rules_desc: Rules are checked by ascending priority. File size ranges are optional and use MB in the form.
policy_group_policy_search_placeholder: Filter by policy name, ID, or driver...
policy_group_no_filtered_policies: No policies match the current filter.
policy_group_rule_hint: Pick a policy, assign a unique priority, and optionally constrain the file size range.
policy_group_description_placeholder: Optional notes about how this group should be used
policy_group_overview_desc: Set the group name, keep a short description, and decide whether it should be enabled by default.
policy_group_enabled_desc: Disabled groups cannot be assigned to users or teams. Move any assigned bindings away before disabling a group.
policy_group_default_desc: Assigned automatically when creating new users. Runtime uploads do not fall back if a user has no policy group.
policy_group_migration_desc: Move every user and team currently bound to the source group into another policy group.
policy_group_migration_hint: This only updates users' and teams' policy_group_id values. It does not move stored objects.
policy_group_migration_target_required: Choose a target policy group first.
policy_group_migration_same_group_invali: The target group must be different from the source group.
policy_group_migration_unavailable: Create another policy group before using migration.
policy_group_migration_success: Moved {{users}} users and {{teams}} teams from {{source}} to {{target}} ({{total}} bindings total).
delete_policy_group_desc: This will remove the group and its routing rules. Assigned users and teams must be moved first.
policy_group_dialog_desc: Define an ordered rule set that maps uploads to storage policies by file size.
policy_group_default_requires_enabled: A default policy group must remain enabled.
policy_group_rule_required: At least one routing rule is required.
policy_group_rule_policy_required: Each rule must select a storage policy.
policy_group_rule_priority_invalid: Each rule priority must be a positive integer.
policy_group_rule_priority_duplicate: Rule priorities must be unique within the group.
policy_group_rule_policy_duplicate: A storage policy can only appear once in the same group.
policy_group_rule_size_invalid: File size limits must be valid non-negative numbers.
policy_group_rule_range_invalid: The max file size must be greater than the min file size.
policy_group_delete_default_blocked: Set another group as default before deleting the current default group.
policy_group_no_policies_available: Create at least one storage policy before creating a policy group.
